title: Totem Boy
description: Makes your totem of undying into a blue boy that rides on your shoulder
body:
Introducing a delightful resource pack that reimagines the Totem of Undying. Instead of the usual totem, you'll now be accompanied by a tiny, friendly blue boy! He'll perch right on your shoulder, ready to protect you.

This pack adds a touch of whimsy and charm to your gameplay. Get ready for a new, adorable companion!
